data.title: InterContinental Hotels Updates Share Capital and Voting Rights
data.description:
InterContinental Hotels (GB:IHG) has released an update.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

InterContinental Hotels Group PLC has disclosed that as of June 30, 2024, the company’s issued share capital comprises 168,595,550 ordinary shares, with 7,006,782 shares held in treasury, resulting in a total of 161,588,768 voting rights. Shares purchased and subject to cancellation since the last report on June 3, 2024, have been considered cancelled in these calculations. Shareholders can use the total voting rights figure as a reference for reporting changes in their stake in the company as per the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules.

data.title: R8 Capital Shares Suspended as Shell Group Lines Up Convertible Loan Funding
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mode Global Holdings Plc ( (GB:MODE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

R8 Capital Investments Plc has had trading in its ordinary shares temporarily suspended from the FCA’s Official List and the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, after missing the deadline to publish its FY25 results. The company expects to release those results by the end of June and will then seek to have the suspension lifted, limiting share liquidity in the meantime and adding timing pressure to its reporting obligations.

Alongside the suspension, R8 Capital has entered into non-binding, conditional heads of terms for a proposed fundraising of at least £500,000 via convertible loan notes. Completion of the subscription, targeted on or before 11 May 2026 and subject to KYC and AML checks, would provide fresh capital to support the shell company’s future transactions and may influence its strategic options once trading in the shares resumes.

More about Mode Global Holdings Plc

R8 Capital Investments Plc is a shell company listed in the Equity Shares (Shell Companies) category on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange. As an investment vehicle, it focuses on capital-raising and corporate transactions rather than operating a traditional trading business, using its listing to facilitate future deals and investments.

Average Trading Volume: 297,401

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £1.07M

See more insights into MODE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Seraphim Space Investment Trust Plc ( (GB:SSIT) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Seraphim Space Investment Trust plc will host a live investor presentation on 5 May 2026, led by Chief Investment Officer James Bruegger of Seraphim Space Manager LLP, via the Investor Meet Company platform. The event, open to both existing and potential shareholders, is intended to deepen investor engagement and provide insight into SSIT’s space technology investment strategy.

Investors can submit questions in advance through the platform until the morning of 4 May 2026 and may register free of charge to attend the session online. Those who already follow Seraphim Space Investment Trust on Investor Meet Company will receive automatic invitations, underscoring the trust’s push to maintain transparent, ongoing communication with its investor base.

data.title: Morgan Sindall Discloses Gifted Shares to CEO’s Closely Associated Person
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Morgan Sindall ( (GB:MGNS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Morgan Sindall Group has disclosed a share transaction involving a person closely associated with its chief executive, John Morgan, in line with Market Abuse Regulation requirements. The notification states that Mrs Rosalind Morgan received a specific gift of 9,014 ordinary shares of 5p each from the estate of a family member, held jointly with two other individuals, in a transaction conducted outside a trading venue on 28 April 2026.

The disclosure underscores the company’s adherence to insider dealing and transparency rules governing dealings by persons discharging managerial responsibilities and their closely associated persons. While the transaction does not reflect an on-market trade or a change in executive remuneration, it ensures investors are informed about changes in the beneficial interests of those connected to senior management, supporting ongoing confidence in the group’s governance standards.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:MGNS) stock is a Buy with a £5800.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Morgan Sindall stock, see the GB:MGNS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MGNS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MGNS is a Outperform.

The score is driven mainly by solid financial performance (consistent revenue growth, improved earnings, and manageable leverage), supported by a constructive longer-term technical trend. Valuation is reasonable with a moderate dividend, but thin margins and cash-flow volatility temper the overall rating.

To see Spark’s full report on MGNS stock, click here.

More about Morgan Sindall

Morgan Sindall Group plc is a U.K.-listed construction and regeneration group, operating through activities such as construction, infrastructure, fit-out, property services and urban regeneration. The group focuses on delivering building and infrastructure projects across public and private sectors, positioning itself as a key contractor in the British construction market.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners ( (CCEP) ) has shared an update.

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners has reported that, as of 30 April 2026, it has 443,217,637 ordinary shares of €0.01 in issue, each carrying one vote, with no shares held in treasury. This confirms the company’s total voting rights at the same figure, providing a clear denominator for investors and other stakeholders when assessing disclosure obligations under U.K. transparency rules.

The update standardises the share capital and voting rights information used for regulatory notifications, helping shareholders determine when changes in their holdings trigger reporting thresholds. By clarifying that all issued shares are voting shares and none are held in treasury, the company enhances transparency around its capital structure and facilitates compliance with the FCA’s disclosure framework.

More about Coca-Cola Europacific Partners

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners is a major beverage bottler and distributor, producing and selling Coca-Cola branded soft drinks and related non-alcoholic beverages across multiple markets. The company operates within the fast-moving consumer goods sector, focusing on large-scale production, packaging and distribution of drinks to retail, hospitality and wholesale customers.

data.title: MedPal AI moves registered office to City of London as it scales AI health platform
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from MedPal AI Plc ( (GB:MPAL) ).

MedPal AI, the AI-powered digital health group listed on AIM and in Frankfurt, has shifted its registered office to new premises on Floor 8, 71 Queen Victoria Street in the City of London. The administrative move places the company closer to London’s financial and professional services hub, which may support its growth ambitions across consumer wellness apps and AI-enabled pharmacy operations.

The company’s operations span an AI wellness app that integrates data from devices such as Apple Health, Fitbit and Garmin, and a robotic, AI-supported prescription fulfilment centre offering same-day and next-day delivery. MedPal AI’s partnerships with Epassi UK and Independent Gyms extend its reach to millions of employees and gym members, underpinning a strategy to expand into B2B licensing for healthcare providers, employers and insurers.

More about MedPal AI Plc

MedPal AI is a UK-based digital health company focused on AI-driven wellness management and automated pharmacy services. Its flagship app aggregates data from more than 100 wearables and health platforms to deliver non-clinical, personalised lifestyle coaching, while its subsidiary runs a 24/7 AI-powered pharmacy distribution centre serving NHS and private prescriptions.

Average Trading Volume: 2,701,621

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Mitsubishi ( (JP:8058) ) has provided an announcement.

Mitsubishi Corporation has announced differences between its non-consolidated actual results for the fiscal years ended March 31, 2025 and 2026. The company has directed investors to a detailed disclosure document, indicating that year-on-year performance variances at the parent-company level are material enough to warrant a formal notice, which may influence investor assessment of earnings trends and capital allocation.

The notice focuses specifically on non-consolidated figures, suggesting that changes in standalone profitability, dividends, or other key metrics could differ from expectations or from consolidated results. Stakeholders are encouraged to review the published details to understand the scale and drivers of these differences, which could affect market perceptions of Mitsubishi Corporation’s underlying financial trajectory.

More about Mitsubishi

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Boozt AB ( (SE:BOOZT) ) has issued an announcement.

Boozt AB has executed the transfer of 320,327 performance-based ordinary shares under its 2023 long-term incentive program, following prior approval at the 2023 annual general meeting. The allocation spans the CEO, group management, key employees and platform staff, aligning management and employee incentives with shareholder interests and reinforcing the company’s commitment to retention and performance-based compensation.

Following the share transfers to 81 participants, Boozt’s total share count remains 62,000,000, comprising ordinary shares with full voting rights and series C shares with reduced voting rights. The company now holds 2,434,914 of its own shares, a structure that may support future incentive schemes while modestly affecting the free float and internal ownership profile.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:BOOZT) stock is a Buy with a SEK113.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Boozt AB stock, see the SE:BOOZT Stock Forecast page.

More about Boozt AB

Boozt AB is a Nordic-based e-commerce company focused on online retail, primarily offering fashion and lifestyle products through its digital platforms. The company targets consumers across the region with a curated assortment, leveraging its technology-driven platform and logistics capabilities to compete in the fast-growing online retail segment.
